completed_tasks.name: 04-01: Fix 3 browser training bugs + add playwright dep
04-02: Unit tests for browser_trainer.py fixed functions

decisions.decision: _ReplayEnv placed at module level (not inside train_browser())
decisions.rationale: Required for direct import in unit tests without side effects at collection time

decisions.decision: DEFAULT_RESULTS_DIR kept as module-level constant with correct value 'data/ml/results'
decisions.rationale: test_showdown_player.py::TestBrowserTrainerImport::test_constants_defined imports it — removing it caused a regression; plan acceptance criteria 'grep returns 0' conflicted with existing test

decisions.decision: _ReplayEnv uses lazy imports in __init__ (not class-level attributes)
decisions.rationale: Avoids loading gymnasium and battle_env at module import time; keeps browser_trainer importable without heavy deps in test environments
